caption: The video features a person wearing a distinctive white wig styled upwards, a white shirt with gold suspenders, and a red bow tie, sitting in front of a microphone in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio setting. The individual is also wearing headphones and seems to be engaged in a conversation or recording session, gesturing with their hand as they speak. The background includes various framed pictures and posters, one of which reads "INQUE FASHION," suggesting a creative or fashion-related theme. Another person, partially visible on the left side of the frame, is holding a red object, possibly a phone or a small device. The overall atmosphere suggests a lively and expressive discussion or interview taking place in a professional yet casual environment.
